ksa_text: Skill in mapping personal data flows across systems, vendors, and jurisdictions to produce records of processing activities (RoPA) in compliance with regulatory requirements.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA SP-S-002 (Security and Privacy) scores 0.438 composite (signal: weak). Scope fit for RAG Engineer: out_of_scope. Preliminary decision: exclude.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Out-of-scope exclusion is internally consistent. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Security and Privacy KSA SP-S-002 as a discrete competency for RAG Engineer?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA excluded at Pass 2 (scope: out_of_scope) or Pass 3. No market evidence warrants reversal for RAG Engineer.

decision_rationale: Security and Privacy is out of scope for RAG Engineer.
